pageSubtitle: Admissions, coding rounds, and AI/ML strategies for GATE CS qualifiers.
bannerText: Get 1-on-1 guidance from CS mentors at IIT Bombay and IISc Bangalore to navigate your M.Tech journey.

topics.title: M.Tech Specializations (AI/ML & Systems)
topics.description: Choosing the right path in top-tier institutes.
points: AI/Data Science cutoffs are extremely high; apply strategically via COAP.
Don't ignore Computer Systems/Architecture—core companies prefer these.
Look into interdisciplinary programs like Computational Data Science (CDS).

topics.title: Institute Coding & Written Rounds
topics.description: Many IITs conduct their own coding tests for MS/Ph.D. admissions.
points: Practice LeetCode Medium problems (Arrays, Graphs, DP).
Revise Probability, Linear Algebra, and Discrete Math for written tests.
Be prepared to write C/C++ or Python code on a whiteboard.

topics.title: PSU Recruitment (NIC, DRDO, POSOCO)
topics.description: Navigating government sector jobs for CS/IT.
points: PSU interviews heavily focus on DBMS, OS, and Networking.
Be ready to explain your B.Tech project architecture in detail.
Understand the current e-governance and cyber-security landscape in India.

topics.title: SOP for MS/Ph.D. in CS
topics.description: Drafting an SOP that stands out to CS faculty.
points: Clearly state your research interest (e.g., NLP, Cryptography, Distributed Systems).
Mention open-source contributions or relevant GitHub projects.
Align your goals with the specific labs available at the institute.
